title: EarthquakeProperties
description: Properties of an earthquake event including magnitude, location, and metadata.

place.description: Textual description of the event location.
place.example: 45 km NE of San Francisco, CA

time.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) of the earthquake occurrence.

updated.description: Unix timestamp (milliseconds) of the last catalog update.

detail.description: API URL for the full event GeoJSON.

felt.description: Number of DYFI (Did You Feel It?) responses.

mmi.description: Maximum Modified Mercalli Intensity (MMI) from ShakeMap.

alert.description: PAGER alert level (green, yellow, orange, red).

tsunami.description: Tsunami hazard flag. 1 if tsunami warning was issued; 0 otherwise.

sig.description: Significance value (0-1000) indicating event importance based on magnitude, MMI, felt reports, and estimated impact.

net.description: Network ID for the preferred source of event data.

code.description: Event code assigned by the network.

magType.description: Magnitude type (ml, md, mb, mw, mww, etc.).

type.description: Event type (earthquake, explosion, quarry blast, etc.).

title.example: M 4.5 - 45 km NE of San Francisco, CA

gap.description: Azimuthal gap in degrees between seismic stations.

dmin.description: Horizontal distance from epicenter to nearest station in degrees.

rms.description: Root-mean-square travel time residual in seconds.

nst.description: Number of seismic stations used to determine earthquake location.
